context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the shipping-status API endpoint with proper unit conversion and progress clamping, the FreeShippingProgress React component with the correct conditional rendering states and CSS class names, currency formatting, and animated progress bar styling. This scenario covers the full UI/API contract for the cart shipping progress feature.

checklist.name: Endpoint path
checklist.description: A GET endpoint at /api/cart/shipping-status (or equivalent route) is defined

checklist.name: Response has isFree
checklist.description: The endpoint response includes an isFree boolean field

checklist.name: threshold in dollars
checklist.description: The threshold field in the API response is in dollars (divided by 100 from the cents stored in the rule), or null

checklist.name: amountNeeded in dollars
checklist.description: The amountNeeded field in the API response is in dollars (divided by 100), not cents

checklist.name: progressPct clamped
checklist.description: progressPct is capped at 100 (using Math.min(100, ...) or equivalent) and is rounded to an integer

checklist.name: null threshold returns null
checklist.description: FreeShippingProgress (or equivalent component) returns null / renders nothing when threshold is null

checklist.name: Unlocked state message
checklist.description: When isFree is true, the component displays 'You unlocked FREE shipping!' (or functionally equivalent text containing 'unlocked' and 'FREE shipping')

checklist.name: Not-yet-free message
checklist.description: When isFree is false, the component displays a message of the form 'Add [amount] more for FREE shipping'

checklist.name: Intl.NumberFormat currency
checklist.description: Currency amounts are formatted using Intl.NumberFormat with locale 'en-US' and style 'currency' / currency 'USD'

checklist.name: Unlocked CSS class
checklist.description: The unlocked state adds the CSS class 'shipping-progress--unlocked' (BEM modifier) to the container

checklist.name: Progress bar fill transition
checklist.description: The progress bar fill element has a CSS transition for 'width' with a duration of 0.4s and ease-in-out timing (i.e., 'transition: width 0.4s ease-in-out' or equivalent)

checklist.name: Both surfaces included
checklist.description: The progress bar component is placed in (or documented as being required in) both the main cart page and a mini-cart/drawer, not just one location
